+                # Track human velocity

+                try:

+                    hp = sim.get_agent_data(1).articulated_agent.base_pos

+                        delta = human_pos_arr - prev_human_pos

+                        spd = float(np.sqrt(delta[0]**2 + delta[2]**2))

+                        # Smooth

+                        human_speed_est = 0.7 * human_speed_est + 0.3 * (spd / 0.04)  # m/s if 25Hz

+                    prev_human_pos = human_pos_arr

+                except Exception:

+                    human_pos_arr = None

+

                 if did_collide:

                     collision_streak += 1

                 else:

                         else:

+                        correction = (dist - TARGET_DIST) * 1.2
